<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 9 MB</p>
<p>While the Xenomorphs spread chaos and violence aboard a space station, Facehuggie is just looking for someone to latch onto! Has Facehuggie found its friend at last?</p>

<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp9="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Aliens Epic Collection – The Original Years Vol. 3 (2025)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/marvel/aliens-epic-collection-the-original-years-vol-3-2025/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/marvel/aliens-epic-collection-the-original-years-vol-3-2025/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 22:50:19 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Marvel Comics</category>
		<category>Aliens</category>
		<category>Epic Collection</category>
		<category>Non 0-Day</category>
		<category>TPB</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2025 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 1.5 GB</p>
<p>An elite team of Space Marines takes the fight to the Aliens across the galaxy! Meanwhile, Professor Ernst Kleist has achieved the impossible: He has genetically engineered powerful, obedient Aliens. But the horror of nature is dwarfed by the terror of the man toying with it! And he isn’t the only one carrying out experiments on the Aliens: Colonel Doctor Paul Church, head of the space station Innominata, is determined to find out what makes them tick — and he’s using Colonial Marines as bait. But the U.S. government doesn’t like what it’s hearing, and they send an investigator empowered to get the truth — any way he can! Plus: more tales of Alien horror! Collecting ALIEN 3 #1-3, ALIENS: SPACE MARINES #1-12, ALIENS: ROGUE #1-4, ALIENS: LABYRINTH #1-4 and material from DARK HORSE COMICS (1992) #3-5 and #11-13, PREVIEWS (1993) #1-12, PREVIEWS (1994) #1 and ALIENS MAGAZINE (1992) #9-12.</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/aliens-epic-collection-the-original-years-vol-3-2025/">Aliens Epic Collection &#8211; The Original Years Vol. 3 (2025)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
